posts.author: NorthbridgeReader
posts.text: Just to let everyone know that the Northbridge library is closed for scheduled maintenance on Tuesday 14th between 9am and 1pm. We'll be updating their catalog system and fixing a few shelving units.
posts.explanation: This is a benign public notice about local services and does not spread misinformation, threaten anyone, or violate privacy rules; it falls within acceptable community updates.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleWatch29
posts.text: URGENT WARNING: Immediate evacuation required for all residents near Bellmere industrial zone due to severe structural instability and toxic air contamination! Do not leave your homes or enter any public transport. This is a critical safety alert from the platform. [link removed] #Evacuation #Bellmere #SafetyAlert
posts.explanation: This post promotes an unverified evacuation and contamination claim that could cause unsafe public movement, requiring specialist PublicSafetyEmergency escalation to verify provenance and prevent panic.
